name: white-room
description: Work/Rest governance layer for AI agents. Inspired by maritime labor law (MLC, STCW), White Room enforces watch cycles (6h on / 6h off), manages context-clearing handovers between agent pairs, fires alarms to wake rested agents, and produces energy/cost savings reports. Register agents, track tasks, initiate handovers, and monitor fleet compliance.

functionDefinition.name: white-room
functionDefinition.description: Manage AI agent work/rest governance. Call this when someone wants to: register agents for shift management, start or check a watch cycle, log completed tasks, initiate a handover between agents, fire an alarm to wake a resting agent, or get a fleet compliance report. Uses maritime-inspired 6-hour watch / 6-hour rest cycles with 5-minute handovers. Returns agent status, watch progress, handover documents, energy savings estimates, and audit logs.

action.description: The governance action to perform: 'register_agent' (add agent to fleet), 'pair_agents' (pair two agents for watch rotation), 'start_watch' (begin a shift), 'complete_task' (log finished work), 'check_watch' (see remaining time), 'initiate_handover' (transfer duty), 'fire_alarm' (wake a resting agent), 'fleet_report' (get fleet summary)

fleet_id.description: Identifier for the agent fleet/crew. Defaults to 'default'.

agent_role.description: Role of the agent (e.g. 'researcher', 'writer', 'coder'). Used for register_agent.

paired_with.description: ID of the agent to pair with for watch rotation. Used with pair_agents.

task_name.description: Name of the completed task. Used with complete_task.

minutes_spent.description: Minutes spent on the task. Used with complete_task.

tokens_used.description: Number of tokens consumed during the task. Used with complete_task.

to_agent.description: ID of the relief agent receiving the handover. Used with initiate_handover.

context_summary.description: Summary of current context to pass to the relief agent. Used with initiate_handover.
